channel.title: Expertise on Maud Grol
channel.description: Recent content in Expertise on Maud Grol

item.title: Analyse
item.description: I am experienced in analyzing data and clearly presenting results in reproducible reports. I mainly use R and Python for all data-related tasks, including machine learning methods and natural language processing.

item.title: Collect
item.description: I have extensive experience with data collection methods such as survey design, A/B testing and semi-structured interviews. I have worked with a.o. Qualtrics, LimeSurvey and Python to collect and process data.

item.title: Visualize
item.description: Visually presenting data helps to provide a quick and clear understanding of the information I have mostly used open source tools R/shiny to create static infographics and interactive dashboards.
